title: Reflections
company: an atmospheric soundscape of composed music and environmental recordings — including cars, footsteps, rustling leaves, and birdsong — Reflections creates a multi-sensory environment that invites audiences to slow down, listen, and reconsider how images shape their understanding of the world. Margareta is a visual artist and art theorist. Her interdisciplinary practice spans painting, installation, animation, video and sound. Her works are exhibited internationally (New York, Toronto, Paris, Belgrade).
